TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O pipaisingan == Iti:yaho, awaayho ko pipaisingan, oni'edawan amisalising ko adadaay a tamedaw, matanento, mikilim to lamit no kilang ato tarod, opapah no kilang ato tarod, nanomen ko mi te'elan a lamit. ilato ko isingi, tahidangen ko ising talaloma'a panenen to adadaay, ancai, micakay ta cemel(sapaiyo) to hakaka'enen no adadaay a tamdaw. Aninisatoi, ilatokotadamaanay a kasa silomaloma no ising, ilakono kanpo-yak atono siy-yak. ilakono kemod ato papotal no tilen ato nipahofucay to wawa a ising, ano silsilen ko kasasilomaloma no ising i,ila ko mihapinangay to tilen, ila kono mata, tangila, ngoso', takolaw, falocu', tinai'fowa','atay, fongoh, misakapahay topising, sapedek, ngaloy, firfir, fi'ik. ilay ko pawawaay to ca'ayay kacipuyapuy a fafahiyan. ilako mihinomay ami fasaw to lawlaw no falocu' a ising. ano iniyalo'ay ila ko isiy-siw. ano paisingi, mihawikid to kingpo(ciyi-paw), malaayaw a mipafangko pangangan, hanga'nipakingsa, malalicay to ising, miciw-siy, miyara to cemel(sapaiyo'). Tamedaw no paisinga i, ilaay ko tapang , kakelidan ato kasasilomaloma no tayal a ising, ilako kasasilomaloma no kangkofu ato misimaway to adadaay a tamedaw, papotal i, ilako mihamhamay tolafang, ilako palakatay to kiwkiwsiya,
S.PHON: == o~u pipaisiŋan == iti:jaħo~u, awaajħo~u ko~u pipaisiŋan, o~uniʡəɬ~ɮawan amisaɾisiŋ ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a taməɬ~ɮaw, matanənto~u, mikiɾim to~u ɾamit no~u kiɾaŋ ato~u taro~uɬ~ɮ, o~upapaħ no~u kiɾaŋ ato~u taro~uɬ~ɮ, nano~umən ko~u mi təʡəɾan a ɾamit. iɾato~u ko~u isiŋi, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u isiŋ taɾaɾo~umaʡa panənən to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, anʦai, miʦakaj ta ʦəməɾ(sapaijo~u) to~u ħakakaʡənən no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. aninisato~ui, iɾato~uko~utaɬ~ɮamaanaj a kasa siɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u isiŋ, iɾako~uno~u kanpo~u-jak ato~uno~u sij-jak. iɾako~uno~u kəmo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u papo~utaɾ no~u tiɾən ato~u nipaħo~ufo~u~uʦaj to~u wawa a isiŋ, ano~u siɾsiɾən ko~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u isiŋ i,iɾa ko~u miħapinaŋaj to~u tiɾən, iɾa ko~uno~u mata, taŋiɾa, ŋo~uso~uʡ, tako~uɾaw, faɾo~uʦo~u~uʡ, tinaiʡfo~uwaʡ,ʡataj, fo~uŋo~uħ, misakapaħaj to~upisiŋ, sapəɬ~ɮək, ŋaɾo~uj, firfir, fiʡik. iɾaj ko~u pawawaaj to~u ʦaʡajaj kaʦipo~u~ujapo~u~uj a fafaħijan. iɾako~u miħino~umaj ami fasaw to~u ɾawɾaw no~u faɾo~uʦo~u~uʡ a isiŋ. ano~u inijaɾo~uʡaj iɾa ko~u isij-siw. ano~u paisiŋi, miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u kiŋpo~u(ʦiji-paw), maɾaajaw a mipafaŋko~u paŋaŋan, ħaŋaʡnipakiŋsa, maɾaɾiʦaj to~u isiŋ, miʦiw-sij, mijara to~u ʦəməɾ(sapaijo~uʡ). taməɬ~ɮaw no~u paisiŋa i, iɾaaj ko~u tapaŋ , kakəɾiɬ~ɮan ato~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u tajaɾ a isiŋ, iɾako~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u kaŋko~ufo~u~u ato~u misimawaj to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a taməɬ~ɮaw, papo~utaɾ i, iɾako~u miħamħamaj to~uɾafaŋ, iɾako~u paɾakataj to~u kiwkiwsija,
S.FORM: == O pipaisingan == Iti:yaho, awaayho ko pipaisingan, oni'edawan amisalising ko adadaay a tamedaw, matanento, mikilim to lamit no kilang ato tarod, opapah no kilang ato tarod, nanomen ko mi te'elan a lamit. ilato ko isingi, tahidangen ko ising talaloma'a panenen to adadaay, ancai, micakay ta cemel(sapaiyo) to hakaka'enen no adadaay a tamdaw. Aninisatoi, ilatokotadamaanay a kasa silomaloma no ising, ilakono kanpo-yak atono siy-yak. ilakono kemod ato papotal no tilen ato nipahofucay to wawa a ising, ano silsilen ko kasasilomaloma no ising i,ila ko mihapinangay to tilen, ila kono mata, tangila, ngoso', takolaw, falocu', tinai'fowa','atay, fongoh, misakapahay topising, sapedek, ngaloy, firfir, fi'ik. ilay ko pawawaay to ca'ayay kacipuyapuy a fafahiyan. ilako mihinomay ami fasaw to lawlaw no falocu' a ising. ano iniyalo'ay ila ko isiy-siw. ano paisingi, mihawikid to kingpo(ciyi-paw), malaayaw a mipafangko pangangan, hanga'nipakingsa, malalicay to ising, miciw-siy, miyara to cemel(sapaiyo'). Tamedaw no paisinga i, ilaay ko tapang , kakelidan ato kasasilomaloma no tayal a ising, ilako kasasilomaloma no kangkofu ato misimaway to adadaay a tamedaw, papotal i, ilako mihamhamay tolafang, ilako palakatay to kiwkiwsiya,
S.PHON: == o~u pipaisiŋan == iti:jaħo~u, awaajħo~u ko~u pipaisiŋan, o~uniʡəɬ~ɮawan amisaɾisiŋ ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a taməɬ~ɮaw, matanənto~u, mikiɾim to~u ɾamit no~u kiɾaŋ ato~u taro~uɬ~ɮ, o~upapaħ no~u kiɾaŋ ato~u taro~uɬ~ɮ, nano~umən ko~u mi təʡəɾan a ɾamit. iɾato~u ko~u isiŋi, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ko~u isiŋ taɾaɾo~umaʡa panənən to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, anʦai, miʦakaj ta ʦəməɾ(sapaijo~u) to~u ħakakaʡənən no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. aninisato~ui, iɾato~uko~utaɬ~ɮamaanaj a kasa siɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u isiŋ, iɾako~uno~u kanpo~u-jak ato~uno~u sij-jak. iɾako~uno~u kəmo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u papo~utaɾ no~u tiɾən ato~u nipaħo~ufo~u~uʦaj to~u wawa a isiŋ, ano~u siɾsiɾən ko~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u isiŋ i,iɾa ko~u miħapinaŋaj to~u tiɾən, iɾa ko~uno~u mata, taŋiɾa, ŋo~uso~uʡ, tako~uɾaw, faɾo~uʦo~u~uʡ, tinaiʡfo~uwaʡ,ʡataj, fo~uŋo~uħ, misakapaħaj to~upisiŋ, sapəɬ~ɮək, ŋaɾo~uj, firfir, fiʡik. iɾaj ko~u pawawaaj to~u ʦaʡajaj kaʦipo~u~ujapo~u~uj a fafaħijan. iɾako~u miħino~umaj ami fasaw to~u ɾawɾaw no~u faɾo~uʦo~u~uʡ a isiŋ. ano~u inijaɾo~uʡaj iɾa ko~u isij-siw. ano~u paisiŋi, miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u kiŋpo~u(ʦiji-paw), maɾaajaw a mipafaŋko~u paŋaŋan, ħaŋaʡnipakiŋsa, maɾaɾiʦaj to~u isiŋ, miʦiw-sij, mijara to~u ʦəməɾ(sapaijo~uʡ). taməɬ~ɮaw no~u paisiŋa i, iɾaaj ko~u tapaŋ , kakəɾiɬ~ɮan ato~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u tajaɾ a isiŋ, iɾako~u kasasiɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u kaŋko~ufo~u~u ato~u misimawaj to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a taməɬ~ɮaw, papo~utaɾ i, iɾako~u miħamħamaj to~uɾafaŋ, iɾako~u paɾakataj to~u kiwkiwsija,
